_description: Expected schema for FinancialReport manual drop-zone files. PIT gate = filingDate.
_forbidden_pit_gate: periodEndDate — must NOT be used as PIT availability anchor
_status: INTAKE_ONLY — no scoring until P29-F dry-run gate

required_fields.name: symbol
required_fields.notes: Listed ticker on TWSE or TPEX

required_fields.name: reportPeriod
required_fields.notes: The accounting period this report covers

required_fields.name: filingDate
required_fields.notes: PIT GATE — the date the report was officially filed/published. NOT periodEndDate.

required_fields.name: revenue
required_fields.notes: Net revenue. Null if not reported in this filing.

required_fields.name: sourceUrl
required_fields.format: URL or DOI of the filing

required_fields.name: notes
required_fields.notes: Free text — e.g. restatement flag, currency conversion note

forbidden_fields.name: outcomeLabel
forbidden_fields.reason: No outcome labels in intake zone — PIT violation risk

forbidden_fields.name: priceReaction
forbidden_fields.reason: Forward-looking price data is outcome leakage

forbidden_fields.name: scoringWeight
forbidden_fields.reason: Scoring not permitted at intake stage

forbidden_fields.name: approvalToken
forbidden_fields.reason: Approval token is generated by the import gate, not placed manually
